titleStmt.title: SII 22.248: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 248. (A.R. No. 248 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE EAST AND NORTH BASES OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. KAMPAṆA-UḌAIYĀR (KAMPA II) SON OF BOKKAṆA (BUKKA II)—Śaka 1291.

summary.p: This is dated in Saumya, Kumbha, śu. 7, Aśvati corresponding to A.D. 1380, February 2, Saturday (not Wednesday). It records the appointment as tiruviḷakkukkuḍi of three shepherd residents of the place for the daily supply of an āḻākku of ghee and 2 nāḻi of milk each (with necessary endowments) for god Viḍaiyinmēlvaruvār and Aḍaiyil-Anbuḍaiyār in the temple at Tiruppanaṅgāḍu by order of the king. The village is said to have formed part of Brahmadēśappaṟṟu in Kaḻumala-nāḍu a division of Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa- maṇḍalam. Mention is made of two officers of the king viz., Viṭṭappar of Ānaigondi and Nambi-Āḻvār Toṅgarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṉu maṇṭaleśvaran Arirāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭan paccama pūrva dakṣiṇu samutrātipati śrīvirapokkaṇa Uṭaiyar kumārar kampaṇa Uṭaiyaṟku cellāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 2 100 9 10 1- ṉ meṟ cellāninṟa savumiya varuṣattu kumpanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu sattamiyum Aśvatiyum peṟṟa putaṉ kiḻamai nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu kāliyūṟ koṭṭattuk kaḻumalanāṭṭup piramatecap paṟṟut tiruppaṉaṅkāṭṭu
Āḷuṭaiyār viṭaiyiṉmelvaruvārkkum Uṭaiyār Aṭaiyilan puṭaiyāṟkum Uṭaiyār Aruḷicceyaṟpaṭikku Āṉaikunti viṭṭapparum nampi Āḻvār toṅkarāyarum Inta nāyaṉmāṟku tiruviḷakkukuṭi Āka viṭṭa tiruppaṉaṅ kāṭṭil Irukkum maṉṟāṭikaḷil māccāttaṉ makaṉ Iḷaiyaperumāḷaiyum pirā ṉāṇṭai makaṉ pirāṅkoṉaiyum kāḷattikkoṉ makaṉ vāttakoṉaiyum cantrātittavaraiyum nāḷoṉṟukku per Oṉṟukku Āḻākku
neyyum per Oṉṟukku Iruṉāḻi pāl Amutukku Aḷakkakkaṭavatāka viṭṭom Ippaṭikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Āḻākku neyyum nāḷoṉṟukku Iruṉāḻi pālum savumiya varuṣam māci mātam mutal cantrātitavaraiyum celvatāka viṭṭom Itukkaḻivu paṇṇuvār keṅkaikaraiyiṟ kurāṟpacuvaik koṉṟāṉ pāvatte pukakkaṭavarkaḷ Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
